name: Easy Lamb Creole Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large Dutch oven. Dust the lamb riblets with flour and brown on all sides in hot oil.
2. Drain the fat from the pan. Add the stewed tomatoes, chicken broth, white wine, chopped parsley, lemon slices, salt, thyme, bay leaf, and instant minced garlic.
3. Cover and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
4. Add the okra and black-eyed peas; cook, covered, for an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
5. Serve the meat separately if desired. This gumbo freezes well.
